docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $93.15 FILED BY THE IDEAL AS TO DEFENDANT VIDAL SONIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-06-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VIDAL SONIA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE IDEAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VIDAL SONIA $93.15 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $176.15, DEFENDANT NON-APPEARANCE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT VIDAL SONIA
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1.47 ACCRUED INTEREST, $20.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT VIDAL SONIA
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $229.88 AS TO DEFENDANT VIDAL SONIA
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT VIDAL SONIA
